name: Phaser 2D Starter
description: Production-ready 2D game template with EventBus, GameState, Constants, high-DPI rendering, Strudel audio, and Playwright tests.

name: Three.js 3D Starter
description: Production-ready 3D game template with AssetLoader, SkeletonUtils, EventBus, GameState, Strudel audio, and Playwright tests.

name: Flappy Bird
description: Classic pipe-dodging game with parallax clouds, chiptune BGM, retro SFX, and full Playwright test suite. Architecture reference game.

name: Asteroid Dodger
description: Dodge falling asteroids in a spaceship. Pixel art sprites, parallax starfield, screen shake, slow-motion death, and chiptune audio.

name: Gem Catcher
description: Catch falling gems, avoid skulls. 3 lives, difficulty escalation, pixel art sprites, parallax stars, shooting stars, and magical audio.

name: Vampire Survivors
description: Survivor-style roguelike with wave-based enemy spawning, auto-targeting projectiles, upgrade system, and scaling difficulty.

name: Barn Defense
description: Tower defense with grid-based building, 5 enemy types, 5 farm-themed towers, splash damage, and resource management.

name: Mog Showdown
description: Looksmaxxing arena dodge game. Photo-composite bobblehead characters, projectile attacks, Frame Mog mechanic, combo tracking.

name: Nick Land Dodger
description: Cyberpunk dodge game. Photo-composite character dodges accelerating binary digits and code symbols. Matrix rain, neon aesthetics.

name: Castle Siege Defense
description: 3D tower defense. Launch parabolic projectiles at marching enemies. Wave system, splash damage, medieval atmosphere, torch lighting.

name: Crowd Dash
description: Neon endless runner through crowded NYC streets. Swerve to dodge crowds, collect hearts, synthwave BGM, particle trails.

name: Flappy Bird 3D
description: Flappy Bird in 3D with cylinder pipes, gradient sky, particles, camera shake, and chiptune music.

name: Flight Simulator
description: Fly through rings with 6DOF controls. HUD instrument panel, altitude warnings, procedural ring spawning, and crash detection.

name: Labyrinth
description: Roll a marble through a 3D maze. Collect gems, find the exit. Gyroscope controls on mobile, WASD on desktop.

name: Singularity Run
description: Matrix-themed endless runner. Dodge obstacles in a digital corridor with matrix rain, neon trails, and terminal aesthetics.

name: Lowball Blitz
description: AI robot sprints through suburbs hurling lowball offers at houses. Dodge angry agents, collect panic points, combo escalation.

name: Rock 'Em Sock 'Em Robots
description: 3D boxing arena. Blue Bomber vs Red Rocker. Punch to knock opponent's head up. AI opponent with adaptive patterns.

name: Trump vs Biden
description: 3D arena battle with animated GLB characters. Throw projectiles at AI opponent, dodge attacks, health and combo tracking.

name: 3D Asset Pipeline Demo
description: Showcase of the 3D asset pipeline. Animated character loading and switching with OrbitControls camera. Soldier, Xbot, Robot, Fox GLBs.

name: Trump Mog
description: Photo-composite character builder. ML background removal, spritesheet generation from photos. Asset pipeline utility.
